metadata.description: Claude-powered CI skills for GitHub repos

plugins.name: install-tend
plugins.description: Set up tend (Claude-powered CI) on a GitHub repo.

plugins.name: tend-ci-runner
plugins.description: Internal CI skills loaded by tend's GitHub Action. Not for manual installation.

plugins.name: tend
plugins.description: Legacy alias for tend-ci-runner. Resolves pre-0.0.2 skill names (e.g. /tend:tend-review).
